title: Pipe-style compose: where then order then limit
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.recent_published_posts/1` that takes a `limit` integer. Start from `Post`, pipe through `where` (published = true), `order_by` (inserted_at desc), `limit` (pinned), then `Repo.all`. Use pipe syntax only. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Chained pipe composition. One-shot for anyone comfortable with Elixir pipes.
